pi_items.source: Downloaded from official Wireshark wiki repositories and verified with tshark. Files confirmed as valid PCAP/libpcap format v2.4
Path specification in setup_task.sh (line 25) matches metadata. Confirmed in export_result.sh.
Path specification in setup_task.sh (line 28-29) and export_result.sh (line 8). Directory created and populated by setup script.
Analyzed all four PCAP files using tshark with eth.src and eth.dst field extraction. Ground truth computed using same algorithm as setup_task.sh (lines 35-157).
MAC address with maximum src_count across all four PCAP files. Found in telnet-cooked.pcap. Extracted using tshark field analysis.
Source packet count for 00:a0:cc:3b:bf:fa in telnet-cooked.pcap, verified via tshark analysis.
Wireshark OUI resolution for MAC 00:a0:cc:3b:bf:fa. Resolved via tshark eth.src_resolved field.
Packet count from http.cap (25,803 bytes). File size and packet count match official Wireshark sample distribution.
Packet count from dns.cap (4,338 bytes). Downloaded from Wireshark wiki official repository.
Packet count from telnet-cooked.pcap (9,244 bytes). Official Wireshark sample containing telnet session data.
Packet count from smtp.pcap (27,850 bytes). Official Wireshark sample with SMTP protocol traffic.
Files downloaded from https://wiki.wireshark.org/SampleCaptures repository. These are publicly available reference PCAP files maintained by the Wireshark project for educational and testing purposes.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses four official Wireshark sample PCAP files (http.cap, dns.cap, telnet-cooked.pcap, smtp.pcap) containing real packet captures from the public Wireshark wiki repository. The combined data contains 12 unique MAC addresses. The most active sender is 00:a0:cc:3b:bf:fa (vendor: Lite-OnU) with 48 sent packets, found in the telnet-cooked.pcap file. Total packets across all files: 233 (http: 43, dns: 38, telnet-cooked: 92, smtp: 60). The data is not synthetic; it consists of real network packet captures maintained by the Wireshark project for sample analysis.
